text:
HUMAN FAILURES — algo must NEVER repeat:

• [disaster_tail_loss] One round-trip loss must never exceed ~3% of session equity. CTEV-style bleeds (−13% portfolio contribution) erase many small wins. Cut at stop immediately — no hope, no averaging down, no 'it will come back'.
  → Bot: EXIT at hard stop; never widen stop after entry; cap loss at MAX_SESSION_TRADE_LOSS_PCT.

• [held_too_long] Humans hold losers hoping for recovery (PLUG, ENVB, CTEV). Algo must exit when momentum fades or stop hits — no discretionary override.
  → Bot: EXIT on spike_top fade or early_loss_threshold; do not council-timeout-hold into red.

• [unproductive_turnover] Fees were $317 (~29% of gross trading P&L). High turnover is the goal only when net edge per dollar traded beats round-trip cost.
  → Bot: SKIP entry unless expected_move > 2× round_trip_fees; penalize gross-win/net-loss trips.

• [wrong_regime_churn] Energy sector net −9.97% despite some winners — churning a weak regime burns fees. Reduce aggression when sector/regime history is net negative.
  → Bot: Lower scan priority / size in sectors with negative session attribution.

• [traded_without_edge] February was −7.94% — trading before setup quality confirmed. Stand aside until spike + entry_quality pass.
  → Bot: SKIP when profit_probability < MIN_PROFIT_PROBABILITY or fakeout_risk high.

• [overtrading_flat_periods] Humans keep clicking; algos should go flat when edge degrades (commander ended 100% cash after strong April).
  → Bot: After N fee-negative trips or loss streak, pause new entries until next session or regime shift.

• CTEV (Industrial): -14.1% contribution -13.4% | $-328
  Human error: Let one industrial loser run — largest dollar loss.
  Correct: EXIT at stop within 1–2% of equity; never −10%+ on single trip.

• PLUG (Energy): -10.3% contribution -9.3% | $-221
  Human error: Held energy story stock through reversal.
  Correct: SKIP or tight stop in negative-attribution energy; cut at early_loss.

• ENVB (Healthcare): -9.1% contribution -9.1% | $-221
  Human error: Biotech hope hold — full position into dump.
  Correct: EXIT on first sign of fade after spike; biotech needs faster cuts.

• SMTK (Technology): -22.5% contribution -5.8% | $-20
  Human error: Chased weak tech without vol confirmation.
  Correct: SKIP when vol_ratio < 1.5 and profit_probability low.
